Video game designers need a broad _______ of computer programming.
Concerning the item that was lost in transit, we will take responsibility for _______.
The Springly Energy marketing team is working hard _______ our latest products.
The job advertisement lists several _______ needed to be considered for an interview.
When the contract is signed and received, it will become _______ immediately.
It is unlikely that a policy change could have _______ the financial challenge that the construction company faced.
Barsan Photo is _______ that their latest printer will not be available before the start of the third quarter.
Thanks to the new system we installed, all lights and other devices turn on _______ when you enter the office.
_______ the high demand for apartments, the study says single detached homes will be the most popular dwelling in five years.
The process for estimating our yearly expenses is _______, so we can start planning staffing for next year.
As of June 26, only one _______ had called to request space at the trade show.
To keep costs _______ an established budget, the owner decided to reduce the size of the garage to be constructed.
The outdoor sales event was a great success _______ the cold and rainy weather.
No _______ of Mr. Hanson's book would be complete without mentioning his insightful analysis of the world of business blogs.
Updating the product line that buyers have complained about will send an obvious _______ to our valued customers.
The Internet will _______ be a crucial part of the economy for the foreseeable future.
The management team required little _______ before deciding to promote Ms. Yang.
The human resources office is adopting a more _______ policy that would give employees additional vacation days.
Mr. Greaves will speak to our suppliers about _______ handling of the transportation situation.
This is only a preliminary list of job candidates, so interviewers should _______ the possibility of last-minute additions.
Market conditions were _______ enough last year for us to make several new acquisitions.
Web advertising is smart in the sense that it can be highly specific and target a market _______ great accuracy.
The library director requests that staff obtain _______ in instructional technology to better support the library's educational programs.
_______ existing products, which are designed for people with technical expertise, this new program should appeal to a wider audience.
Some functions of our Web team are to identify problems with applications and then _______ fixes.
This partnership _______ a great opportunity for us at Stolant Tech to broaden our inventory of available software.
We will need to delay the start of the advertising campaign because the relevant contracts have only been _______ completed.
_______ much of the accounting staff will be on vacation next week, the ones remaining in the office will be very busy.
_______ sending multiple e-mails to share ideas and reach a decision, the team leader called a one-hour meeting to discuss the issue.
Applicants for the position of flight attendant at Joyous Airlines need to _______ a calm sense of authority at all times.

answers.content: They are intended to increase visitors' enjoyment of the park.
They are designed to communicate these updated regulations.
Visitors especially enjoy using the park café and other amenities.
Planting new trees requires proper planning and site selection.
Take all personal belongings with you when you leave the beach.
Sadly, having to pay for the beach is a growing phenomenon nationwide.
A fine will be imposed on anyone who has not secured passes for local beaches.
We will also provide beach towels for any guest who asks for one.
We regret any inconvenience these measures may cause this week.
We are proud of the financial services we provide to our loyal customers.
The metal bookshelves were installed only five years ago.
Books are always welcome at local charities.
A large number of filmgoers came to the reopening.
Big changes are often difficult but necessary.
The owners will likely enjoy significant profits.

PART_6.directionText:
PART 6

Directions: Read the texts that follow. A word, phrase, or sentence is missing in parts of each text. Four answer choices for each question are given below the text. Select the best answer to complete the text. Then mark the letter (A), (B), (C), or (D) on your answer sheet..

PART_7.directionText:
PART 7

Directions: In this part you will read a selection of texts, such as magazine and newspaper articles, e-mails, and instant messages. Each text or set of texts is followed by several questions. Select the best answer for each question and mark the letter (A), (B), (C), or (D) on your answer sheet.

PART_4.directionText:
PART 4

Directions: You will hear some talks given by a single speaker. You will be asked to answer three questions about what the speaker says in each talk. Select the best response to each question and mark the letter (A), (B), (C), or (D) on your answer sheet. The talks will not be printed in your test book and will be spoken only one time.

PART_5.directionText:
READING TEST

In the Reading test, you will read a variety of texts and answer several different types of reading comprehension questions. The entire Reading test will last 75 minutes. There are three parts, and directions are given for each part. You are encouraged to answer as many questions as possible within the time allowed.

You must mark your answers on the separate answer sheet. Do not write your answers in your test book.

PART 5

Directions: A word or phrase is missing in each of the sentences below. Four answer choices are given below each sentence. Select the best answer to complete the sentence. Then mark the letter (A), (B), (C), or (D) on your answer sheet.

PART_2.directionText:
PART 2

Directions: You will hear a question or statement and three responses spoken in English. They will not be printed in your test book and will be spoken only one time. Select the best response to the question or statement and mark the letter (A), (B), or (C) on your answer sheet.

PART_3.directionText:
PART 3

Directions: You will hear some conversations between two or more people. You will be asked to answer three questions about what the speakers say in each conversation. Select the best response to each question and mark the letter (A), (B), (C), or (D) on your answer sheet. The conversations will not be printed in your test book and will be spoken only one time.

PART_1.directionText:
LISTENING TEST

In the Listening test, you will be asked to demonstrate how well you understand spoken English. The entire Listening test will last approximately 45 minutes. There are four parts, and directions are given for each part. You must mark your answers on the separate answer sheet. Do not write your answers in your test book.

PART 1

Directions: For each question in this part, you will hear four statements about a picture in your test book. When you hear the statements, you must select the one statement that best describes what you see in the picture. Then find the number of the question on your answer sheet and mark your answer. The statements will not be printed in your test book and will be spoken only one time.

Statement (C), "They're sitting at a table," is the best description of the picture, so you should select answer (C) and mark it on your answer sheet.
